name: BTK200W Fresnel
comment: BTK200W Fresnel 200W WW Manual Zoom: The BTK200W Fresnel is an affordable lighting fixture that, thanks to the latest LED technology, revolutionizes the way we illuminate stages, theaters and broadcast studios. This Fresnel fixture uses a powerful LED engine and guarantees a smooth and evenly distributed field of warm white light, serving as a contemporary replacement for conventional Fresnels. The adjustable, variable beam angle of 15-46 degrees ensures a soft, high-quality field with >97% CRI. The BTK200W comes equipped with PowerConnectors and a 3-pin and 5-pin DMX as standard, ensuring compatibility with your existing equipment and a simple installation process. The barn door is included for precise beam shaping and glare reduction.
